style_name: dark cyber noir anime with neon magenta and cyber pink dominance

color_rules.rule: limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights

camera_language: wide cinematic silhouette shot with the protagonist small in frame
medium close-up with soft parallax background

medium close-up with soft parallax background
forward tracking shot, low angle, rain reflections stretching toward dawn
medium close-up with soft parallax background
close-up side profile, hair crossing one eye, city lights behind
forward tracking shot, low angle, rain reflections stretching toward dawn
upward crane shot as the paper crane catches the accent light
transition_language: match cuts through neon reflections, paper crane motion, waveform-like light trails, and passing train lights
